betterquesting:10.desc:8:
Love... It does not exist by itself. Love cannot be by itself.
Three. 
Three worshipped by the Realmshifters. 
Three rulers who do not rule.
Three who Love so much to let others truly live their freedom.
To make mistakes, to embark on pointless endeavours, to succumb to vice, wo waste time, to reject others, to forget.
And yet, Love is always there. Waiting for our return. Waiting for our realization.
Because it is a realization, that Love is not present anymore, that we have rejected it. That our life has gotten worse because of it.
Love, it is always there, waiting for us to be one with it.
But, as it often happens, we get busy with the details of life, and we forget that Love is there. 
Work is stressful, relationships are messy, studying is hard, money is a bit short this month, the Twilight Horde and the Shyre Empire are invading Terra, the Meatball Man has taken over. 
Details, and often distractions.
Because Love is always there.
And now, I come to it, as I am. Humbled that they did not reject me. Proud that they accept me.
And with this, with this final consacreation, that my journey was one well-traversed, that the destiny I sought to reject was a good one, that the role I now play is a just and necessary one, the return of the Arbiter must begin.
Chaos destroyed Order, and Chaos will now bring it back!
